description: A SNAP recipient wants to check the current balance on their EBT card.

nodes.task_description: Identify and authenticate the benefits recipient using their card number and PIN or personal information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent securely verifies the caller's identity.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the current balance from the EBT system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully finds the current balance on the card.

nodes.task_description: Inform the citizen of their current balance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the balance amount.
